description: Commisioned by McLaren Newport Beach, a Californian dealership, the MSO X is a 10-car run of 570S's dressed in the same goodies as the GT4 race car. The race-spec rear wing is functional and adds 100kg of downforce, but otherwise the car is mechanically the same as the base 570S. Pictured here is car #01.
creator: Bnuuy
